<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill out as much of this as is relevant.
For non-trivial changes, please open an issue first to discuss the approach.
-->

## Summary

What does this PR do, in one or two sentences?

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number), if applicable.

## Changes

- List the key changes here

## Testing

- [ ] `bash -n bin/*.sh scripts/*.sh tests/*.sh` passes
- [ ] `shellcheck bin/*.sh` passes (warnings or above)
- [ ] `./tests/test-roundtrip.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Manual test: describe what you ran and the result

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changes
- [ ] docs/ updated if relevant
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `[Unreleased]`

## Backward compatibility

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change documented in CHANGELOG with migration notes

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I have not committed any credentials, real config files, or logs
- [ ] My commits are reasonably squashed and have descriptive messages
